Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class LanguageSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.LanguageSettings
public class LanguageSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for LanguageSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="LanguageSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="enableCanadaIcuFormat" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDataTranslation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEndUserLanguages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableICULocaleDateFormat" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLanguageExtensionPackage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLocalNamesForStdObjects" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLocaleInsensitiveFiltering" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePlatformLanguages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableTranslationWorkbench" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useLanguageFallback" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
